key_drivers: Falling real yields (10Y TIPS at 1.78%, down from ~2.1%) providing broad support for risk assets, gold, and rate-sensitive instruments
Middle East geopolitical escalation driving safe-haven demand (gold, JPY) and oil supply disruption fears
Central bank divergence: BoJ hawkish tightening and RBA rate hike expectations creating bullish bias for JPY despite risk-off backdrop

fed_stance.source: CME FedWatch - 99.4% probability of no change at March 18-19 FOMC

real_yields.source: FRED DFII10 - 1.78% as of 2026-03-09, down from ~2.1%

vix_level.source: CBOE - VIX at 25.22 as of March 11, 2026

vix_direction.source: CBOE - VIX up from 24.93 prev close, trending higher

gdpnow.source: Atlanta Fed GDPNow - 2.1% Q1 2026 estimate (Mar 6), revised down

credit_spreads.source: FRED BAMLH0A0HYM2 - HY OAS at 3.19% as of 2026-03-09, up from ~2.5%

gold_etf_flows.source: Bloomberg/SeekingAlpha - GLD saw $4.58B outflows week of Mar 9

oil_inventories.source: EIA - crude inventories rose +3.48M bbl week ending Feb 27, 2026

geopolitical_risk.source: Multiple news sources - Middle East escalation, Strait of Hormuz concerns

oil_supply.source: Geopolitical risk to Strait of Hormuz, OPEC+ discipline

ecb_stance.source: ECB/Reuters - expected to hold at 2.00% at March meeting, but hawkish tilt

eur_rate_differential.source: ECB hawkish tilt vs Fed hold - markets pricing ECB hike in 2026

eurozone_growth.source: Eurozone manufacturing PMI 50.8, services PMI 51.8 in Feb 2026

rba_stance.source: Bloomberg/Westpac - 75% probability of 25bp RBA hike on March 17

aud_rate_differential.source: RBA hiking to 4.1% while Fed holds at 3.50-3.75%

china_growth.source: China mfg PMI 49.0 (Feb, contracting) but S&P Global PMI improving; net stable

boj_stance.source: BoJ Governor Ueda hawkish, rate at 0.75%, hike to 1.00% expected by June

jpy_rate_differential.source: BoJ hiking cycle while Fed holds - JPY-USD differential narrowing (bullish JPY)

stale_sources: DFII10 (data as of 2026-03-09, 1 business day lag)
BAMLH0A0HYM2 (data as of 2026-03-09, 1 business day lag)
EIA crude inventories (data for week ending 2026-02-27, released 2026-03-04)
fallbacks_used: TradingEconomics for copper price (primary Investing.com blocked)
Bloomberg/SeekingAlpha for Gold ETF weekly flows (World Gold Council monthly data used for context)
